bodyText:
HEADING1:Insider Trading Compliance — SEBI PIT Regulations | Virtual Auditor

What is Insider Trading Compliance — SEBI PIT Regulations | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

SEBI Prohibition of Insider Trading compliance. Code of conduct, trading window, disclosures. Listed company compliance advisory.
Virtual Auditor provides professional insider trading compliance — sebi pit regulations | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?
• Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) with 14+ years experience
• IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333)
• Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
• Associate Company Secretary (ACS)
• Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai
• 100+ complex valuations completed
HEADING2:Our Approach
We combine deep regulatory expertise with AI-powered tools to deliver accurate, defensible, and timely results. Every engagement is led by CA V. Viswanathan, ensuring senior-level attention.
HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Virtual Auditor ensures timely compliance with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) requirements under the Companies Act, 2013 and LLP Act, 2008. Our compliance calendar tracks all statutory deadlines.

Key compliance activities include: preparation and filing of annual returns (MGT-7/MGT-7A), filing of financial statements (AOC-4), director KYC (DIR-3 KYC), board meeting and AGM coordination, maintenance of statutory registers, and event-based filings (changes in directors, registered office, share capital, etc.).

Non-compliance attracts penalties of Rs. 100 to Rs. 5 lakh per form plus Rs. 100/day additional fees. Our proactive compliance management ensures zero penalties. We serve companies in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and pan-India.
